Is 15972 a prime number?

To check if 15972 is a prime number, we can try dividing it by smaller prime numbers starting from 2.

15972 ÷ 2 = 7986 (not a whole number)
15972 ÷ 3 = 5324 (not a whole number)
...
15972 ÷ 13 = 1225.69 (not a whole number)
15972 ÷ 17 = 940.47 (not a whole number)

15972 ÷ 37 = 432

Since 15972 has divisors other than 1 and itself, it is not a prime number.
